title: Scutellaria perilomia

intro: Scutellaria perfoliata, also known as the square-stemmed skullcap, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to North America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of Scutellaria perfoliata include flavonoids, such as baicalein and oroxylin A, as well as phenolic acids and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Scutellaria perfoliata include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
